title: arecaceae
intro: The arecaceae rank is a family of plants, commonly known as the palm family. It is a large and diverse group of plants that includes over 2,600 species of palms, ranging from the small, shrub-like palms to the towering, tree-like palms. Arecaceae is characterized by its unique leaf arrangement, where the leaves are often long and feathery, and the inflorescence is typically a spike or a cluster of flowers. This family of plants is found in tropical and subtropical regions around the world and includes many economically important species, such as coconut palms and date palms.
